---
title: "Interactive Neural Analysis"
description: "A deep dive into weight initialization using interactive Plotly visualizations."
date: "2026-04-10"
image: thumbnail.png # Add a small preview image for the grid
categories: [Deep Learning, Optimization]
---

## Executive Summary
This is a high-level overview. You can put key takeaways in the margin.

::: {.column-margin}
**Key Insight:** Model accuracy improved by 15% using this specific weight initialization.
:::

## Interactive Visualization
Instead of a static PNG, use a library like Plotly.

```{python}
import plotly.express as px
df = px.data.iris()
fig = px.scatter(df, x="sepal_width", y="sepal_length", color="species")
fig.show()
